prompt_improvements.improvement: Require integration-test prompts to explicitly handle shared-environment data collisions (pre-invocation snapshot/freshness checks and deterministic cleanup strategy).
Require explicit destructive-operation guard env vars and non-production slot checks whenever tests may delete cloud artifacts.
Require timeouts and actionable error handling for all subprocess invocations (including CLI command, stdout, and stderr context).
Require a direct mapping table from each acceptance criterion to concrete test assertions and workflow configuration variables.
